name: run-jest
description: Run jest tests with common flags (--cache/--no-cache, --no-coverage) and tail output, optionally from a subdirectory, with cache clearing, summary mode to filter build noise, env var setting, and grep output filtering.

parameters.name: --no-cache
parameters.description: Disable jest cache, forces full re-transform

parameters.name: --tail
parameters.description: Number of output lines to show (default: 30)

parameters.name: --clear-cache
parameters.description: Remove jest cache before running (replaces rm -rf + run-jest)

parameters.name: --summary
parameters.description: Show only test summary lines (PASS/FAIL/Suites/Tests/Snapshots/Time), filtering out build warnings

parameters.name: --grep
parameters.description: Filter output lines matching PATTERN (grep -E), e.g. PASS|FAIL|Test Suites

parameters.name: --env
parameters.description: Set environment variable as KEY=VALUE before running jest (repeatable, e.g. --env=TZ=UTC --env=NODE_ENV=test)

examples.expected: Test summary: PASS/FAIL results, Test Suites, Tests, Snapshots, Time (last 20 lines)

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses cd, rm -rf cache, npx jest, common flags, and tail into one command; --summary filters out build/deprecation noise from test output, saving downstream observation token costs; --env collapses inline VAR=val prefix chains into one flag, saving 1-2 agent steps per jest call with env vars.
